items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom Unveil LLM-Optimized Inference Chip
items.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom have partnered to introduce a new 'Jalapeno' inference chip specifically designed to optimize performance and efficiency for large language models.

items.title: Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents
items.summary: A new research paper introduces Qwen-AgentWorld, a framework utilizing language world models to enhance the capabilities of general AI agents, achieving strong performance across various benchmarks.

items.title: NatureBench: Can Coding Agents Match the Published SOTA of Nature-Family Papers?
items.summary: NatureBench evaluates the current state-of-the-art coding agents, questioning if they can autonomously replicate or surpass the performance reported in high-impact scientific publications.

items.title: Listen Labs Raises $69M to Scale AI Customer Interviews After Viral Stunt
items.summary: Listen Labs secured $69 million in funding following a viral billboard hiring campaign, aiming to expand its AI-powered platform for customer interviews and insights.

items.title: Europe Pushes Back on Washington's Chip War
items.summary: European nations are reportedly challenging Washington's aggressive stance in the global chip war, signaling potential shifts in semiconductor supply chain dynamics and AI hardware access.

items.title: Cerebras Stock Plunges After Earnings, CEO Cites Misunderstood Margin Outlook
items.summary: AI chip maker Cerebras Systems saw its stock drop significantly after its latest earnings report, with the CEO attributing the decline to a misunderstanding of the company's margin outlook.

items.title: RIFT-Bench: Dynamic Red-teaming For Agentic AI Systems
items.summary: A new benchmark, RIFT-Bench, is introduced to dynamically red-team agentic AI systems, aiming to identify and mitigate potential vulnerabilities and failure modes in complex AI behaviors.

items.title: Neuro-Symbolic Drive: Rule-Grounded Faithful Reasoning for Driving VLAs
items.summary: Researchers propose Neuro-Symbolic Drive, a method that combines neural networks with symbolic rules to enable faithful and explainable reasoning for Vision-Language Agents in autonomous driving scenarios.

items.title: OpenThoughts-Agent: Data Recipes for Agentic Models
items.summary: OpenThoughts-Agent presents a collection of data recipes designed to improve the training and performance of agentic AI models, offering practical guidance for developers.

items.title: AOHP: An Open-Source OS-Level Agent Harness for Personalized, Efficient and Secure Interaction
items.summary: AOHP introduces an open-source, operating system-level agent harness designed to facilitate personalized, efficient, and secure interactions for AI agents.

items.title: Escaping the Self-Confirmation Trap: An Execute-Distill-Verify Paradigm for Agentic Experience Learning
items.summary: This paper proposes an 'Execute-Distill-Verify' paradigm to help agentic AI systems avoid self-confirmation biases and improve learning from experience.

items.title: Former Infosys Chief Launches New Startup to Challenge IT Services World
items.summary: A former Infosys CEO has unveiled a new startup aiming to disrupt the traditional IT services industry, likely leveraging advanced AI and automation solutions.

items.title: Critique of Agent Model
items.summary: This paper offers a critical analysis of current agent models, highlighting their limitations and suggesting directions for future research and development.

items.title: Semantic Browsing: Controllable Diversity for Image Generation
items.summary: Semantic Browsing introduces a novel approach to image generation that allows for controllable diversity by enabling users to semantically browse and refine generated outputs.

items.title: FLAT: Feedforward Latent Triangle Splatting for Geometrically Accurate Scene Generation
items.summary: FLAT proposes a new method using feedforward latent triangle splatting to achieve geometrically accurate and high-quality 3D scene generation.
